Mandhana WPL Heroics Guide RCB To 4th Straight Win

Jan 18, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Mandhana WPL Heroics Guide RCB To 4th Straight Win

Smriti Mandhana stole the show as Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) claimed their fourth consecutive win in the Women’s Premier League (WPL), defeating Delhi Capitals (DC) by eight wickets on Saturday.

RCB’s skipper led from the front with a scintillating 96 off 61 balls, narrowly missing out on a century by just four runs. Her innings powered RCB to chase down DC’s total of 166 with 10 balls to spare, consolidating the team’s dominant position in the tournament.

Mandhana’s performance not only inspired her team but also highlighted her growing stature as one of the premier batters in women’s T20 cricket.
